base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of climb — a character from 1987 contra. Climbing ladder — used in base-interior top-down stages. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Climbing ladder — used in base-interior top-down stages
